tasks.instruction: Register for 2 free in-person fintech networking events happening next calendar month that start after 6:00 PM and add them to your schedule.

tasks.instruction: Join 3 topic-based communities that each have a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then pin those communities to your dashboard.

tasks.instruction: Request a 1-hour mentoring session with a marketing-focused mentor who has at least 5 years of experience, a rating of 4.5+ stars, and an hourly rate under 100, scheduled at least 3 days from today between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM.

tasks.instruction: Select a coworking membership plan that costs under 250 per month, includes meeting-room access, and offers the highest number of included meeting-room hours, then start a 7-day trial of that plan.
